name: 身份揭露（臥底警察真相）
description: 男主的多層身份逐步揭露——從霸道總裁到犯罪頭目再到臥底警察，每一層揭露都重塑觀眾對前面所有劇情的理解。觀眾恍然大悟的同時為男主的犧牲動容。

examples.drama_title: 申浩男&朱丽岚 | 她是秦家灭门案幸存者，化名寻凶复仇时，遇上深不可测的他。二人在试探中相互吸引[MULTI SUB | FULL]#MiniDrama #精彩大陆短剧
examples.excerpt: My code name is 79820 / I'm the police's undercover agent in Xinghui / You will undergo plastic surgery to look like Lu Jianqing / Go undercover in the gang / You are a police officer from the first day you joined the police force you were destined to sacrifice more than others
